problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing
hypothesis: If Fear memory reconsolidation interference via timing is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
